analysis:
Based on your $7M portfolio analysis:

**Best CSP:**
PLTR $120 strike, 2025-06-18, 36 DTE, $2.66/$2.74 bid/ask, 0.21 delta, 22.8% annualized return
- Excellent timing: 55% IVP + 23% pullback from highs
- Quality growth stock with room to add (3.35% current vs 5% max)

**Best Position Income CC:**
GOOGL $400 strike, 2025-06-18, 36 DTE, $10.60/$10.95 bid/ask, 0.40 delta, 28.2% annualized return
- Strong profit position (avg cost $149 vs current $388)
- High IVP at 99.6% makes premium attractive

**LEAPS/PMCCs:**
None qualify - All core positions either extended >8% above MA50 or showing "WAIT" trend signals due to recent weakness

**Bull Call Spreads:**
None available

**IVP Environment:** Elevated volatility across most names (MSFT 88%, GOOGL 100%, NFLX 77%, PLTR 55%) creating attractive premium selling opportunities, especially for CSPs on pullbacks.
